contract.description: Each row is one decompile request for a single function entry. Success means the adapter returned that function unit, not a whole-program dump (DCE/Dogbolt-style).

bare_compile.note: Bare-compile is a form-quality diagnostic; not used for semantic ranking.

readability_axis.note: Readability proxies (goto, temp density, flag soup) are diagnostics only. No composite readability rank is published.

tracks.note: Track/language/ISA/opt pivots are extension diagnostics. Official ranking remains semantic pass rate on the core C PE cohort.

speed.note: Decompile latency diagnostics only. Not a semantic ranking axis. Row times are adapter wall-clock; microbench adds cold/warm trials.

diagnostics.note: source_similarity, ast_similarity, readability_proxy, bare_compile, track/ISA pivots, and speed are non-ranking diagnostic axes; correctness uses semantic evidence only (original_binary oracle). mvp.same_function is the infra honesty axis (requested function boundary), not a semantic ranking substitute.

bare_compile.note: Bare-compile is a form-quality diagnostic; not used for semantic ranking.

readability_axis.note: Readability proxies (goto, temp density, flag soup) are diagnostics only. No composite readability rank is published.

tracks.note: Track/language/ISA/opt pivots are extension diagnostics. Official ranking remains semantic pass rate on the core C PE cohort.

speed.note: Decompile latency diagnostics only. Not a semantic ranking axis. Row times are adapter wall-clock; microbench adds cold/warm trials.
